citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
There is an expired bottle of medication still in use in the kennel. A bottle of Safeguard (dewormer) expired 09/2025. The
licensee reported he has used the medication since the expiration date. Expired medications are improper for usage as
the efficacy, potency, and freshness cannot be confirmed. If the medications are no longer effective, normally preventable
diseases may become a problem. Correct by ensuring that all medications are not expired when in use, so the licensee is
able to use the appropriate methods to prevent, control, diagnose, and treat diseases. The licensee disposed of the bottle
at the tim eof the inspection. Correct by: 2/18/26, onward.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
n

narrative:
2.40(b)(2) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
There is an expired bottle of medication still in use in the kennel. A bottle of Safeguard (dewormer) expired 09/2025. The 
licensee reported he has used the medication since the expiration date. Expired medications are improper for usage as 
the efficacy, potency, and freshness cannot be confirmed. If the medications are no longer effective, normally preventable 
diseases may become a problem. Correct by ensuring that all medications are not expired when in use, so the licensee is 
able to use the appropriate methods to prevent, control, diagnose, and treat diseases. The licensee disposed of the bottle 
at the tim eof the inspection. Correct by: 2/18/26, onward. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee. 
 
 n
